'''Koorivar''' was the native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Koorivar/Legends|Koorivar]] species from [[Kooriva/Legends|Kooriva]]. Most Koorivar were fluent in both Koorivar and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], although only literate in their own language.<ref name="U" />

Koorivar language used whispers and soft sibilants, which had to be combined with subtle hand gestures to be fully meaningful.<ref name="U" />

{{Language-stub}}
